name: NovaSound Elite Wireless Headphones
description: Experience true audio purity with NovaSound Elite. Featuring advanced active noise cancellation (ANC), 40-hour battery life, and plush memory foam earcups for all-day comfort. Seamlessly connect to multiple devices via Bluetooth 5.2.

name: Chronos Minimalist Chronograph Watch
description: Crafted for the modern explorer, the Chronos Chronograph balances architectural simplicity with high-precision timekeeping. Features a premium leather strap, brushed surgical-grade stainless steel case, and 50m water resistance.

name: AeroStep Knit Runner Shoes
description: Lighter than air, designed for performance. The AeroStep Knit features an ultra-breathable engineered knit upper, responsive foam cushioning, and an anatomical outsole that maps your natural stride for maximum energy return.

name: Lumina Ceramic Smart Ambient Light
description: Transform your space with Lumina. A hand-cast ceramic smart lamp that synchronizes with your daily rhythms. Control over 16 million colors and customizable light scenes via your smartphone or simple voice commands.

name: Vertex Carbon Fiber Backpack
description: The ultimate daily commuter pack. Built with waterproof ballistic nylon and genuine carbon fiber reinforced panels. Includes a TSA-friendly padded 16" laptop sleeve, hidden security pocket, and USB pass-through port.

name: HydroStream Insulated Flask
description: Keep your beverages cold for up to 24 hours or steaming hot for 12. Double-wall vacuum insulation coupled with a durable powder-coated finish ensures a condensation-free grip. Crafted from pro-grade 18/8 stainless steel.

name: Bespoke Merino Wool Sweater
description: Knitted from 100% fine Australian Merino wool, this crewneck sweater offers natural temperature regulation and unmatched softness. The tailored athletic cut provides a refined silhouette suitable for both casual and formal wear.

specs.Care Instructions: Hand wash cold or dry clean

name: Ember Glass Pour-Over Coffee Maker
description: Brew the perfect cup. Ember combines heat-resistant hand-blown borosilicate glass with a sustainable walnut wood collar. The included reusable double-mesh stainless steel cone filter captures fine oils for a rich, sediment-free flavor.
